---
title: "Econometrics: Time Series Analysis"
subtitle: "BSc EFDS — Imperial Business School"
---

Welcome to the course notes for **Econometrics: Time Series Analysis**.

These notes are designed to accompany the lectures and provide a self-contained reference for the module.

## Topics

| Topic | Title                                             |
|-------|---------------------------------------------------|
| 1     | [Introducing Time Series Analysis](Topic1.html)   |
| 2     | [Introducing ARMA(p, q) models](Topic2.html)      |
| 3     | [Measuring dependence](Topic3.html)               |
| 4     | [Defining stationarity](Topic4.html)              |
